flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Governors State University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Governors State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Governors State University rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (15.8% → 22.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Governors State University fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.6k → $12.0k).
